author: Eurogamer
text:
After over five years in early access, Valheim is finally graduating to version 1.0

Viking survival and crafting hit, Valheim, which first appeared in early access in early 2021, is almost ready for its full release. Developer Iron Gate announced at the PC Gaming Show that the game will officially launch on 9th September.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Citizen Sleeper creator's new game is a "fungalpunk" RPG in which you're a parasite, infecting the lives of people in a city inspired by post-punk Britain

Citizen Sleeper creator Gareth Damian Martin's new game is something quite different: a first-person "fungalpunk" narrative role-playing game inspired by post-punk Britain, in which you play as a literal parasite, infecting and navigating the lives of people in Signet City.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Stealth classic Thief: The Dark Project is getting the remaster treatment from retro specialist Nightdive Studios

Retro specialist Nightdive is at it again. After successfully tackling System Shock and its sequel (giving them the remake and remaster treatment respectively), Nightdive is once again returning to the world of legendary developer Looking Glass Studios and sprucing up another of its beloved early immersive sims. Yup, it's time to retreat to the shadows as we await the launch of Thief: The Dark Project Remastered on PC and consoles.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Xbox's Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution are not timed exclusives, as PlayStation 5 misses out on upcoming releases

We just got another look at Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution at this evening's Xbox Games Showcase. While many had assumed that Gears of War: E-Day specifically would be coming to PlayStation 5 as well as part of Xbox's recent drive to release its game across multiple platforms, that is not the case.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Crazy Taxi World Tour officially announced, Sega immediately upsets everyone by announcing it used generative AI

It's been a rollercoaster day for Crazy Taxi. Today, at Xbox's showcase, we saw the first trailer for the long-teased rebooted game in the series. In a new trailer (below) Sega announced that the game is set to launch on Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, Windows PC, and Xbox Series X in 2027.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Xbox unveils retro-inspired console and controller to celebrate its 25th anniversary, and they're launching this November

It's Xbox's 25th birthday this year, don't you know, and Microsoft is celebrating in a multitude of ways. It's made its logo transparent, for starters, and it's decided to go all-caps. But if that's still not enough to be getting on with, the company has now revealed a special transparent green Xbox Series X and controller that'll be available to purchase this November.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Steampunk RPG Clockwork Revolution arrives 2027, as an Xbox console exclusive

Steampunk RPG Clockwork Revolution will be an Xbox console exclusive on its release in 2027. It is also coming to PC

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4's DMZ extraction mode gets an action-packed trailer at the Xbox showcase

Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4's extraction shooter mode has been revealed in full.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Persona 6 is real, coming to Xbox Series X/S, PS5 and PC, but that's about all we know

At this evening's Summer Game Fest 2026 showcase, Atlus finally lifted the lid on Persona 6.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Spyro: A Realm Beyond brings the beloved purple dragon back into the spotlight at the Xbox Games showcase

Prayers have been answered and the coping can end at last. Spyro is back at long last, with Spyro: A Realm Beyond set to release in spring 2027 on the Xbox Series X/S, PS5, PC, and Nintendo Switch 2.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Plague Tale prequel Resonance pushes Sophia into the spotlight in its latest trailer, and it's launching this August

Resonance: A Plague Tale Legacy, the third game in developer Asobo's acclaimed historical action-adventure series, is coming to Xbox Series X/S, PlayStation 5, and PC on 27th August.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Persona 4 Revival launches into an already-stacked February 2027, will be on Xbox Game Pass on Day One

It's been a while, but we've finally learned more about Persona 4 Revival during today's Xbox livestream. Per a new trailer from Atlus, Persona 4 Revival launches on 18th February on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, and PC.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Final Fantasy's Tifa Lockhart joins Street Fighter 6 in surprise crossover reveal, but not everyone is happy about it

Final Fantasy's Tifa Lockhart is coming to Street Fighter 6.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Wo Long 2: Wings of Ember makes a scorching debut at the Xbox Games Showcase, set to release in early 2027

Wo Long 2: Wings of Ember has been revealed at the Xbox Games Showcase. It's releasing in early 2027 for the Xbox Series X/S, PS5, PC, and Nintendo Switch 2.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
State of Decay 3 releases 2027, seven years after it was first announced

State of Decay 3 is due to release next year, across Xbox Series X/S, PlayStation 5 and PC. It will also be coming to Game Pass.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Ninja Theory reveals Hellblade 3, except it's named Senua because it's evolved into something else - a full action-adventure game

We're getting a third Hellblade game except it's not called Hellblade 3 because it's a different thing to what's come before. Senua, as it's simply known, is a full-fat action-adventure, with more exploration, more puzzles, and deeper combat.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Metro 2039 goes to war with the underground's Führer in a moody first gameplay trailer, as February 2027 release window confirmed

Following Metro 2039's striking cinematic unveiling back in April, developer 4A Games has revealed first proper gameplay of its gritty post-apocalyptic horror shooter, narrowing down its previously announced "winter" release date to February next year.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Halo: Campaign Evolved arrives in July, and it's still coming to PS5 despite Xbox shake-ups

One of the easiest guesses you could've made going into the 2026 summer showcase season was that Xbox would announce the release date for Halo: Campaign Evolved. The game, which had been rumoured for about a year, was only officially unveiled last October.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Fable gets a moody story trailer at the Xbox Games Showcase, coming to Xbox, PS5, and PC next February

Fable has just got a new release date trailer at the Xbox Games Showcase. It'll be releasing on Xbox Series X/S, PS5, and PC on the 23rd February, 2027.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Gears of War: E-Day reportedly no longer coming to PlayStation 5

UPDATE 6.09pm: And, just when I hit publish, Asha Sharma confirmed that Gears of War: E-Day will be an Xbox console exclusive. It arrives on 6th October, and will be available day one with Game Pass.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Surprise! Cult hit Vampire Survivors is getting a new name, Vampire Survivors - First Survivaton, plus a new free expansion pack

Award-winning Vampire Survivors has announced a new expansion pack and a new name: Vampire Survivors - First Survivaton.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
The Alters: Last Variable DLC pack introduces 20 hours of new content, including an "entirely new progression loop"

The Alters: Last Variable is a new DLC coming for 11 Bit Studios' survival game, The Alters, on 13th July.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Star Wars Zero Company, the XCOM-like strategy game, gets a release date

EA has dropped a cinematic teaser for its upcoming Star Wars game, Star Wars Zero Company, and confirmed a release date: 27th August, 2026.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Xbox Games Showcase 2026 live report - all the news and announcements as Asha Sharma presents for the first time

The Xbox Games Showcase is today, Sunday 7th June, at 6pm BST (7pm CEST / 1pm EDT / 10am PDT), and we're covering all the news and announcements from live, right here, in this article.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Xbox Games Showcase 2026 live report - all the news and announcements as Asha Sharma presents for the first time

The Xbox Games Showcase is today, Sunday 7th June, at 6pm BST (7pm CEST / 1pm EDT / 10am PDT), and we're covering all the news and announcements from live, right here, in this article.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
I've played Resonance: A Plague Tale Legacy and it's very different to Requiem and Innocence - but that's not necessarily a bad thing

It's all-change in Resonance: A Plague Tale Legacy. This series - known for stealth and the emotional adventures of brother and sister Hugo and Amicia in plague-ridden France - now no longer has stealth, no longer has Amicia and Hugo, and no longer takes place in France. But - and I say this as someone fond of the Plague Tale series and who's played the new game for an hour or so - Resonance is undeniably a Plague Tale game, and a very promising one at that.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Vampire: The Masquerade - Eternal Whispers is a narrative-driven CRPG channelling Disco Elysium

Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodlines 2 was a considerable disappointment, but that isn't stopping the IP's video game efforts in their tracks. In fact, Eternal Whispers - a new CRPG taking more than a few cues from Disco Elysium - might be the balm we need.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Microsoft's next big release Halo: Campaign Evolved just got a slick story trailer, with footage captured on PS5 Pro

Halo: Campaign Evolved, one of Microsoft's next big triple-A releases, just got a cool-looking cinematic story trailer. And all footage you'll see in it has been captured on a PS5 Pro, of course.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
State of Decay 3 dev wanted the first gameplay trailer to show off how much higher the game's quality is, but promises deeper systems are still there

State of Decay 3 was among the few surprising reveals during the Xbox Games Showcase. We've been waiting years to hear, or see, well, anything from the zombie survival management sim since the moment it was initially announced - which was nearly six years ago.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Doom: The Dark Ages expanding with Revelations DLC in July, plus a free Ripatorium update adding to the game's customisable arena mode

Doom: The Dark Ages was a fun time, but we'd been wondering about the release window for its DLC (and its very nature) since a Premium Edition was released day one. During the Xbox Games Showcase, Bethesda Softworks and id Software finally unveiled the Revelations DLC.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Nintendo Direct announced for tomorrow

If you thought we were done with the showcases, think again, as Nintendo has just announced a Direct. This Direct will air tomorrow, 9th June, at 3pm UK time.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Guild Wars 3 will have no battle pass or subscription because ArenaNet studio lead doesn't want to "keep people hostage"

Guild Wars 3 will feature no mandatory subscription or premium battlepass, and will be buyable as a premium product like previous games in the series.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Arkane Lyon's Blade game isn't dead, despite rumours following Xbox Games Showcase no-show

UPDATE 2.38pm: Arkane's Blade project has not been cancelled.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Monster Hunter: World has now sold over 30m units worldwide, becoming Capcom's "best-selling single title of all time"

Monster Hunter Wilds' much-anticipated expansion-sized DLC, titled Ascendance, is coming next year. But with lots of performance woes and a long wait for meaty endgame battles, we aren't surprised the game always struggled to live up to the heights of Monster Hunter: World, a game which has been blessed with enduring popularity. Now, Capcom has revealed 2018's instalment has crossed an important milestone.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Yes, Gears of War: E-Day is bringing back Horde and Versus, even if they were barely mentioned

As promised, Gears of War: E-Day developer The Coalition followed up the Xbox Games Showcase with a presentation entirely dedicated to the upcoming third-person shooter. The nearly 28-minute-long Direct expanded on the gameplay demo we saw at the Showcase, revealing more details about the core design philosophy, as well as the modes we can expect at launch.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
"Maybe AI could create art, but while I live, I don't think I'll see it" - weeks after starring in a Prada art promotion created with AI tools, Hideo Kojima seems to dismiss the controversial tech's creative abilities

Cast your minds back to last month, and you will recall a rather bizarre video featuring Death Stranding creator Hideo Kojima travelling through space and crashing on a hostile planet. This wasn't a promotion for a new game, rather it was a collaboration with filmmaker Nicolas Winding Refn and fashion house Prada for an art installation. Oh, the short film - known as Satellites II - was made with the help of AI tools, which you won't be surprised to hear ruffled more than a few feathers.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Carcass Clad, the Mouthwashing team's next game, is a horrifying co-op tank game, announced at the PC Gaming Show

The developers of Mouthwashing - the sci-fi horror hit - have announced their next game: Carcass Clad.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Cassette Beasts 2002 is the sequel to 2023's monster-collecting RPG, and it's coming to PC and consoles with multiplayer from the get-go

Many indie studios have tried to replicate Pokémon's formula, but few have actually cracked the code. In 2023, Bytten Studio got it right with Cassette Beasts, mainly because it had something to add to the mix and wasn't entirely built on nostalgia. Now, the developers aim to take it to the next level with Cassette Beasts 2002.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Surprising no one, Marvel 1943: Rise of Hydra won't be out this year

Marvel 1943: Rise of Hydra, a game that genuinely only seems to come up when it's getting delayed, has been… delayed yet again. That's according to Paramount Games Studio boss, who revealed that the ambitious game is playable, but won't be out for some time.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Xbox seeks to clarify its approach to console exclusive games, after last night's PS5 snub for Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution caught many off guard

Xbox has shed more light on the company's exclusivity strategy, after last night's showcase threw a few surprises our way.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
The Super Mario Galaxy Movie crosses $1bn worldwide, but its predecessor still retains the video game adaptation crown

Despite making the jump to video-on-demand on digital platforms last month, The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is still holding its theatrical position in cinemas in some locations. Now, it's finally pushed its global box office haul past the $1bn mark.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Fable is getting some post-launch DLC already, with an extended look at gameplay planned for later this week

Playground Games has announced some post-launch DLC for Fable, months out from its release date in February of next year.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
